title: M.Sc. Computer Science — Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
description: Graduate program focused on machine learning, deep learning, and applied AI systems.

title: B.Sc. Computer Science
description: Undergraduate degree in computer science — foundations across systems, algorithms, and software engineering.

title: AWS Certified Machine Learning — Specialty
description: Industry certification in designing, building, and deploying ML solutions on AWS.

title: Fundamentals of Accelerated Computing with Modern CUDA C++
description: GPU programming and accelerated computing with modern CUDA C++.

title: Azure AI Fundamentals
description: Foundational certification covering AI workloads and services on Microsoft Azure.

title: OpenUSD Crash Course — Build 3D Data Pipelines for Physical AI
description: OpenUSD scene graphs, layering, and data pipelines for Physical AI and Omniverse workflows.

title: MCP Course Unit 3 — Automation in Production
description: Model Context Protocol fundamentals and production automation patterns for AI agents.

title: Make a 2D Action Platformer in Unreal Engine 5
description: Gameplay programming and engine workflows in Unreal Engine 5.

title: AI Agents Course
description: End-to-end course on building production AI agents: tool use, planning, multi-step reasoning, and orchestration.

title: LLM Course
description: Transformer architectures, fine-tuning, evaluation, and deployment of large language models with the Hugging Face ecosystem.

title: NLP Course
description: Natural language processing with Transformers — tokenization, fine-tuning, datasets, and the full HF pipeline.

title: Deep Reinforcement Learning Course
description: Theory and practice of deep RL — policy gradients, PPO, SAC, and training agents in classic and procedurally generated environments.

title: ML for Games Course
description: Applying machine learning and RL inside Unity ML-Agents to ship intelligent behaviors in games.

title: Audio Course
description: Audio ML fundamentals — ASR, TTS, audio classification, and Whisper-based pipelines.

title: Computer Vision Course
description: Modern computer vision with vision transformers, detection, segmentation, and multimodal pipelines.

title: LangChain for LLM Application Development
description: Building production LLM applications with LangChain — prompts, chains, memory, retrieval, and agents.
